parents.subject: LU-17000 utils: Initialize var 'gw' and 'net' before using

commit.subject: LU-17000 utils: Check sysconf(_SC_PAGESIZE) before using
commit.message:
LU-17000 utils: Check sysconf(_SC_PAGESIZE) before using

Calling sysconf(_SC_PAGESIZE) could return -1 on
error. This patch adds check after calling sysconf()
instead of directly using the value. This makes
calling calloc() safe.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-pcc
CoverityID: 426260 ("Out-of-bounds write")
Fixes: f172b116 (LU-10092 llite: Add persistent cache on client)
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: I19982d44d406578d959bfd586270d06b4a69dd78
